parameters.query:
WITH upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO agent_sessions (user_id, agent, session_id, name, sort_order)
  SELECT $2::integer, $3::varchar, $4::varchar, $5::text, COALESCE($6::integer, 0)
  WHERE $1 = 'upsert' AND COALESCE($4, '') != ''
  ON CONFLICT (user_id, agent, session_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    sort_order = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.sort_order, 0), agent_sessions.sort_order),
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE agent_sessions.deleted_at IS NULL
  RETURNING session_id, name, sort_order, updated_at
),
deleted AS (
  UPDATE agent_sessions SET deleted_at = NOW()
  WHERE $1 = 'delete' AND user_id = $2::integer AND agent = $3::varchar AND session_id = $4::varchar AND deleted_at IS NULL
  RETURNING session_id
),
existing AS (
  SELECT session_id, name, sort_order, updated_at
  FROM agent_sessions
  WHERE user_id = $2::integer AND agent = $3::varchar AND deleted_at IS NULL
)
SELECT session_id, name, sort_order, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at)::bigint AS updated_ts
FROM (
  SELECT session_id, name, sort_order, updated_at FROM existing
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deleted d WHERE d.session_id = existing.session_id)
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upserted u WHERE u.session_id = existing.session_id)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT session_id, name, sort_order, updated_at FROM upserted
) combined
ORDER BY sort_order, updated_at
